site.name: Coloring Pages
site.description: Free printable coloring pages for kids. Animals, cars, dinosaurs, space, jobs, buildings and 10 more categories. Over 100 pages to download and print, no registration needed.

hero.eyebrow: Over 100 free coloring pages for kids aged 4–8
hero.heading: Find your favourite coloring page.
hero.text: Animals, dinosaurs, space, jobs and 10 more categories. Download and print for free, no registration.

home.categoriesHeading: What do you want to color today?

browseAll.heading: All Coloring Pages

browseAll.metaDescription: Browse all free coloring pages to download and print. Animals, cars, dinosaurs, space and 10 more categories for kids.

category.pagesHeading: Click a coloring page to print or download

coloring.downloadFreeLabel: Download and print, no registration needed.
